name: Data Security Posture Management
businessValue: Unifies DLP, Insider Risk and sensitivity-label signals into a single posture view with prioritized recommendations.
notes: Included with Microsoft 365 E5 via the underlying Purview DLP, Insider Risk Management and Information Protection workloads. Not listed in the M365 Maps matrix — added here so the UI surfaces it.

name: DSPM for AI
businessValue: Surfaces sensitive-data exposure in Copilot, Entra-registered AI apps and consumer GenAI; drives policy to block or label risky prompts.
notes: Same underlying Purview workloads as DSPM, scoped to generative AI interactions. Included with Microsoft 365 E5. Not listed in the M365 Maps matrix.
